title: Lightning Fast
description: A modpack that includes the best optimizations and quality of life features.
body:
Lightning Fast is a modpack that contains a collection of comprehensive performance-enhancing and quality-of-life mods. It tackles both performance issues and quality-of-life improvements, making your gameplay smoother and more enjoyable.

Key Features:
- Performance Boosts
- Connected Textures
- Shader Support
- Better F3 Menu
- Mod Menu
- Zoom Keys
- Decrease Resources Used When The Game Is Not In Focus
- No Unnecessary Warnings
- Controller Support
- Model Fixes
- 3D Skin Layers
- Native or Borderless Fullscreen
- Install Shader Packs, Resource Packs, and Data Packs in game
- Search In The Keybinds Menu
- No Chat Reports
- No Reloading Screen
- Additional Support For Tweaking Various Aspects of The Game Using Resource Packs
